    firewall: "squid"

};

const tmpPath = '/tmp/gh-aw/aw_info.json';
fs.writeFileSync(tmpPath, JSON.stringify(awInfo, null, 2));
console.log('Generated aw_info.json at:', tmpPath);
console.log(JSON.stringify(awInfo, null, 2));

// Set model as output for reuse in other steps/jobs
core.setOutput('model', awInfo.model);

2026-02-26T22:11:38.6444217Z The PR has been successfully created. Here's a summary of all the inconsistencies found and fixed:
2026-02-26T22:11:38.6444832Z 
2026-02-26T22:11:38.6444942Z ## Changes Made
2026-02-26T22:11:38.6445116Z 
2026-02-26T22:11:39.1413591Z ### 1. `documentation/Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md`
2026-02-26T22:11:39.8363624Z **Problem**: Both code examples used outdated **mocha** (`Context` from `"mocha"`, `this.currentTest`) and **chai** (`assert` from `"chai"`) patterns. The repo has migrated to **vitest**.
2026-02-26T22:11:39.8364560Z 
2026-02-26T22:11:39.8364665Z **Fixes**:
2026-02-26T22:11:40.3002768Z - Replaced `import { assert } from "chai"` with `import { describe, it, assert, beforeEach, afterEach } from "vitest"`
2026-02-26T22:11:40.5565078Z - Replaced `import { Context } from "mocha"` with `import type { VitestTestContext } from "@azure-tools/test-recorder"`
2026-02-26T22:11:40.7683676Z - Changed `createRecorder(context: Context)` → `createRecorder(context: VitestTestContext)`
2026-02-26T22:11:41.0002071Z - Changed `new Recorder(context.currentTest)` → `new Recorder(context)`

2026-02-26T22:11:41.2323689Z 
2026-02-26T22:11:41.4603989Z ### 2. `documentation/Generate-code-from-TypeSpec.md`
2026-02-26T22:11:41.7004646Z **Problem**: `npm install -g @pnpm` uses an invalid scoped package name.
2026-02-26T22:11:41.7005083Z 
2026-02-26T22:11:41.9361336Z **Fix**: Changed to `npm install -g pnpm`.
2026-02-26T22:11:41.9361719Z 
2026-02-26T22:11:41.9361902Z ### 3. `documentation/steps-after-generations.md`
2026-02-26T22:11:42.3761781Z **Problem**: Three `pnpm build --filter=${PACKAGE_NAME}` commands were missing the trailing `...` required to build a package and all its dependencies.
2026-02-26T22:11:42.3763138Z 
2026-02-26T22:11:42.3763323Z **Fix**: Added `...` to all three affected lines.
2026-02-26T22:11:42.3763627Z 
2026-02-26T22:11:42.3763791Z ### 4. `documentation/using-azure-identity.md`
2026-02-26T22:11:42.8441236Z **Problem**: Two stale descriptions in the `@azure/identity` section:
2026-02-26T22:11:43.5563349Z - `InteractiveBrowserCredential` was described as using the deprecated "implicit grant flow", with instructions to enable implicit grant in the app registration, and a false claim that it only works in browsers.
2026-02-26T22:11:43.7843331Z - `DefaultAzureCredential` only listed 2 credential types in its chain when the actual implementation tries 7.
2026-02-26T22:11:43.7843837Z 
2026-02-26T22:11:44.5639998Z **Fixes**: Updated to describe the current authorization code + PKCE flow, removed the outdated browser-only note, and expanded the `DefaultAzureCredential` chain to include all 7 credential types.

This reflects status of builds and checks.\n 4. get_files - Get the list of files changed in a pull request. Each thread contains logically grouped review comments made on the same code location during pull request reviews. 2026-02-26T22:11:58.8458751Z {"timestamp":"2026-02-26T22:11:35.996729486Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## Summary\n\nThis PR fixes several documentation inconsistencies found across the `documentation/` folder by cross-referencing the actual source code and repository structure.\n\n---\n\n### 1. `Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md` — Outdated mocha/chai patterns\n\nBoth code examples in this file used mocha and chai, which were replaced by vitest in this repository. Specifically:\n\n- **Example 1 (`glossary.spec.ts`)**: Replaced `import { assert } from \"chai\"` with vitest imports; replaced `beforeEach(async function() {...})` with `(ctx) =\u003e` arrow function; updated import paths to use `.js` extension (ESM).\n- **Example 1 (`utils/recordedClient.ts`)**: Removed `import { Context } from \"mocha\"`; replaced with `import type { VitestTestContext } from \"@azure-tools/test-recorder\"`; updated `createRecorder(context: Context)` to `createRecorder(context: VitestTestContext)`; changed `new Recorder(context.currentTest)` to `new Recorder(context)`.\n- **Example 2 (`monitor.spec.ts`)**: Removed `import { assert } from \"chai\"` and `import { Context } from \"mocha\"`; added vitest imports; updated `beforeEach(async function (this: Context)` to `beforeEach(async (ctx) =\u003e`; updated `new Recorder(this.currentTest)` to `new Recorder(ctx)`.\n\nThese patterns now match the actual test files in the repository (e.g., `sdk/purview/purview-workflow-rest/test/public/workflow.spec.ts`, `sdk/fabric/arm-fabric/test/public/utils/recordedClient.ts`).\n\n---\n\n### 2. `Generate-code-from-TypeSpec.md` — Wrong pnpm package name\n\nThe `code-gen-pipeline` prerequisites section had `npm install -g @pnpm` which is an invalid package name. The correct package name for pnpm is just `pnpm` (no `@` scope prefix).\n\n**Before:** `npm install -g @pnpm`  \n**After:** `npm install -g pnpm`\n\n---\n\n### 3. `steps-after-generations.md` — Missing `...` on build filter commands\n\nThree `pnpm build --filter=${PACKAGE_NAME}` commands were missing the trailing `...` which is required to also build the package's dependencies (per the repo's CONTRIBUTING.md and CLAUDE.md). The Linux variant had the `...` but the Windows variants did not, and one Linux playback variant was also missing it.\n\nAll three instances on lines 70, 79, and 85 have been fixed to include the trailing `...`.\n\n---\n\n### 4. `using-azure-identity.md` — Stale `@azure/identity` information\n\n**`InteractiveBrowserCredential`**:\n- The doc described it as following the \"implicit grant flow\", which Microsoft has deprecated. The actual `@azure/identity` v3+ implementation uses the authorization code flow with PKCE (`sdk/identity/identity/src/credentials/interactiveBrowserCredential.ts:127`).\n- The doc stated \"this credential can only be used in the browser but Node.js support will be added in the future\" — this was fixed years ago. `InteractiveBrowserCredential` fully supports Node.js (opens a browser window).\n- Removed instructions to enable \"Implicit grant\" in app registrations, which is no longer the correct setup.\n\n**`DefaultAzureCredential`**:\n- The doc listed only `EnvironmentCredential` and `ManagedIdentityCredential` in the chain. The actual implementation (`sdk/identity/identity/src/credentials/defaultAzureCredential.ts`) tries 7+ credential types: `EnvironmentCredential`, `WorkloadIdentityCredential`, `ManagedIdentityCredential`, `VisualStudioCodeCredential`, `AzureCliCredential`, `AzurePowerShellCredential`, and `AzureDeveloperCliCredential`.\n","branch":"docs/fix-documentation-inconsistencies","title":"Fix documentation inconsistencies in documentation/ folder"},"name":"create_pull_request"}}}
